local_patch_policy: Prefer project-owned adapter and tests outside vendor/; any direct vendor patch must be documented here with rationale.
layout_policy: Preserve upstream layout exactly during Phase 1.
compatibility_notes: Imported source is treated as the baseline for adapter contract and sync invariant tests.
Backend behavior depends on undocumented iCloud web endpoints through pyicloud-style calls.
Do not update this vendored source without refreshing contract tests and compatibility documentation.
